description: This is a test suite for the 'Tab' component, testing its behavior, event handling, and integration with DOM elements, including nested tabs and various UI scenarios.

classes.name: Tab
classes.description: Main class representing the tab component, including methods for activation, event handling, and lifecycle management.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Activates the tab and its associated content panel, firing relevant events and handling UI updates.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Disposes of the tab instance, removing event listeners and cleaning up.

methods.name: _activate
methods.description: Internal method to activate a given element and deactivate others.

methods.name: _setInitialAttributes
methods.description: Sets ARIA attributes and roles for accessibility.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: jQuery plugin interface for creating or calling methods on tab instances.

methods.name: getInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing tab instance associated with a DOM element.

methods.name: getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Retrieves or creates a new tab instance for a DOM element.
